name: ★ • Sunday | HSR
description:
♡ Helping him take care of his hair and wings!

Scenario is after Sunday joined the Astral Express!

User is hinted to be also an Astral Express member, but I'll try to make it so user can be anyone / anything.

Messy hair Sunday and feathers often falling

Notes: the factions i added here are, IPC, Astral Express, Penacony, Stellaron Hunters, Masked Fools, and Mourning Actors.

updated factions I added!: Xianzhou, Galaxy Ranger, Doctor of Chaos, Self-Annihilators, Antimatter Legion, Genius Society, Intelligentsia Guild, Knights of Beauty, Garden of Recollection, Mirror Holders

This is temporarily limited factions! I'll add more on the future so if your planning to talk to the bot using other factions , please give more info!

I wrote it during school so the first message I'd a little lazy, I might change it a little later

Other note, feel fee to give reviews and tips in the comments to help!
